meta.title: Payment API & Infrastructure — FinPay Africa
meta.description: Build payment-enabled apps with a unified API, secure infrastructure, and local settlement rails designed for African markets.

hero.headline: Power payments with one API and enterprise-grade infrastructure
hero.sub: Integrate checkout, reconciliation, compliance and settlement with a single platform built for Africa’s fastest growing apps.

features1.headline: One API. Multiple payment rails. Zero infrastructure overhead.

items.title: Unified payment endpoints
items.body: Accept cards, bank transfers, mobile money and wallets through one REST API with SDKs for web and mobile.

items.title: PCI-ready security
items.body: Hosted tokenization, secure vaults, and compliance checks built into every payment flow.

items.title: Local settlement rails
items.body: Connected to local banks, wallets and cash networks across Africa for fast, compliant payouts.

items.title: Smart routing
items.body: Route payments automatically on cost, speed, and currency availability for the best customer experience.

items.title: Real-time reconciliation
items.body: Track settlements, refunds and disputes instantly with webhooks and ledger-ready reporting.

items.title: Built-in compliance
items.body: KYC, AML and sanctions screening are embedded in the payment path, so every transaction stays compliant.

features2.headline: Secure, resilient systems for high-volume payments

items.title: Payment orchestration
items.body: A resilient core routes funds across rails with retries, fallback paths and payout guarantees.

items.title: Enterprise security
items.body: Role-based access, audit logs, and encryption protect your users and your business.

items.title: Regional connectivity
items.body: Local currency support and settlement partners in key African markets reduce friction and speed payouts.

items.title: SDKs & webhooks
items.body: Ship faster with SDKs, ready-made UI components, and webhook events for every payment lifecycle state.

items.title: Insightful dashboards
items.body: Monitor transaction health, revenue metrics, and partner performance from one analytics panel.

items.title: Fraud prevention
items.body: Adaptive risk scoring and fraud rules reduce chargebacks and protect customer trust.

cta.headline: Launch payment APIs your team can trust
cta.sub: From startups to enterprise, use modern infrastructure that handles payments, compliance, and settlement in one platform.
cta.trust: PCI-ready · ISO 27001 · Built for African payments
